items.caption: A slide from a presentation, likely educational in nature, titled "data mining using weka." it features a blue background with white text listing bullet points about weka, which is a software tool for data mining. the text mentions that weka is a bird found only in new zealand, and it lists various features of the software, such as a data mining workbench, machine learning algorithms for data mining tasks, 100+ algorithms for classification, 75 for data preprocessing, 25 for feature selection, and 20 for clustering, finding association rules, etc. in the bottom right corner, there is a logo for "weka" with the text "the university of waikato" below it. the slide is numbered "slide 3" in the bottom right corner.
